# services.pfix-srsd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.pfix-srsd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.pfix-srsd.configurePostfix` | `boolean` | Whether to configure the required settings to use pfix-srsd in the local Postfix instance. |
| `services.pfix-srsd.domain` | `string` | The domain for which to enable srs |
| `services.pfix-srsd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to run the postfix sender rewriting scheme daemon. |
| `services.pfix-srsd.secretsFile` | `absolute path` | The secret data used to encode the SRS address. to generate, use a command like: `for n in $(seq 5); do dd if=/dev/urandom count=1 bs=1024 status=none \| sha256sum \| sed 's/  -$//' \| sed 's/^/          /'; done` |
